name: NDA Research Hub
description: Curated web resources for developing a mutual NDA under Washington State law

web_landscape.description: NDA resources by category — templates, legal guidance, tools, statutes

properties.name: NDA Research Hub
properties.purpose: Curated resources for drafting an enforceable mutual NDA — WA state focus

properties.name: Templates & Examples
properties.purpose: Open-source and free NDA templates — starting points for drafting

properties.name: eForms — Free NDA Templates
properties.purpose: 21 free NDA templates in PDF and Word — mutual, unilateral, employee, contractor, and industry-specific

properties.name: Bonterms Mutual NDA
properties.purpose: Open-source mutual NDA, CC BY 4.0, drafted by Bonterms Standard Agreement Committee — balanced commercial starting point

properties.name: Universal NDA (uNDA)
properties.purpose: Standardized NDA for routine commercial transactions — eliminates negotiation overhead, UC Hastings collaboration

properties.name: Open Agreements — 25 Legal Templates
properties.purpose: Generates signable DOCX from templates — NDAs, cloud terms, SAFEs, NVCA financing docs

properties.name: NVCA Model Legal Documents
properties.purpose: National Venture Capital Association model documents including NDA provisions — industry-accepted baseline for VC deals

properties.name: NonDisclosureAgreement.com
properties.purpose: Dedicated NDA resource — downloadable templates, clause explanations, sample language for common scenarios

properties.name: Legal Guidance
properties.purpose: Expert articles on NDA clauses, enforceability, pitfalls, and drafting best practices

properties.name: ABA — Best Practices for Negotiating NDAs
properties.purpose: American Bar Association on definition scope, standard exclusions, marking requirements, and duration — authoritative legal guidance

properties.name: 8 Essential NDA Provisions
properties.purpose: Practical breakdown of the eight core NDA clauses with drafting tips for each provision

properties.name: One-Way NDA vs. Mutual NDA: A Founder's Guide
properties.purpose: When to use unilateral vs mutual NDAs with concrete scenarios for tech and life sciences companies

properties.name: 11 Mistakes That Could Invalidate Your NDA
properties.purpose: Common pitfalls — overbroad definitions, missing consideration, excessive duration, failure to maintain secrecy

properties.name: ACC — Issues Enforcing NDAs in the United States
properties.purpose: Association of Corporate Counsel on state-specific enforceability, judicial reasonableness tests, and public policy limitations

properties.name: Ten Tips for Writing Clear Contracts
properties.purpose: Plain-language drafting guide — active voice, defined terms, sentence structure, eliminating legalese

properties.name: Tools & Generators
properties.purpose: NDA generators, contract analysis, and legal AI tools

properties.name: Lumin AI NDA Generator
properties.purpose: Free AI-powered NDA generator — customized agreements from natural language descriptions, e-signature and PDF

properties.name: Spellbook — AI Contract Review
properties.purpose: AI contract review inside Microsoft Word — redlining, benchmarking, risk-flagging NDAs and other agreements

properties.name: AI Lawyer — Document Generator
properties.purpose: AI legal document generator — state-specific contracts including NDAs with clause explanations

properties.name: QuickLegalTools — Free NDA Generator
properties.purpose: US-focused NDA generator with real-time validation, custom terms, instant PDF — no registration

properties.name: Standards & Statutes
properties.purpose: Legal foundations — trade secret law, federal statutes, WA state law

properties.name: Uniform Trade Secrets Act (UTSA)
properties.purpose: Uniform Law Commission page for UTSA (1979, amended 1985) — adopted by 48 states including WA, defines trade secret and misappropriation

properties.name: Defend Trade Secrets Act of 2016 (DTSA)
properties.purpose: Full text and legislative history — federal private civil cause of action for trade secret misappropriation with whistleblower immunity

properties.name: Cornell LII — Trade Secret
properties.purpose: Legal encyclopedia entry defining trade secrets under federal and state law — links to UTSA, DTSA, and Restatement of Torts

properties.name: RCW 19.108 — Washington Uniform Trade Secrets Act
properties.purpose: Washington State's adoption of UTSA — the specific statute governing trade secret claims and NDA enforceability in WA

properties.connection: Both open-source mutual NDAs, different drafting philosophies
NVCA is VC-specific, Bonterms is general commercial
Open Agreements includes NDA among 25 templates
ABA is authoritative guidance, 8 provisions is practical checklist
Mistakes article shows what happens when best practices are ignored
ACC enforcement guide discusses state-specific laws including WA
Style guide for drafting the provisions
Understanding mutual vs unilateral leads to choosing Bonterms template
WA state adoption of the uniform act
Federal layer on top of state UTSA — adds civil cause of action and whistleblower immunity
AI review tool checks the same provisions the guide recommends

properties.difference: Lumin generates custom NDAs, eForms provides static templates

properties.reason: Templates are starting points — guidance ensures they're used correctly
Legal guidance is grounded in statutes and case law
Tools generate templates — templates are the output
